title: Master Starkeiller
content:
{{Top|rwp|sortkey=*Master Starkeiller}}
'''Master Starkeiller''' (name withheld) co-wrote the backstories of [[Olana Chion/Legends|Olana Chion]] and [[Silya Shessaun/Legends|Silya Shessaun]] appearing in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]], through the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature of [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].

His alias is Master Starkeiller on [[StarWars.com]], and [http://boards.theforce.net/members/1153858/ Starkeiller] on [[TheForce.net]]. He was also a user on [[Wookieepedia]], where he was known as {{Srlink|User:Starkeiller|Starkeiller}}.

==Works==
===Bibliography===
*{{DB|character|olanachion|Chion, Olana}} (co-written by ''the fragrant wookiee'' and [[Billy Buehler]]) – February [[2006]]
*{{DB|character|silyashessaun|Shessaun, Silya}} (co-written by ''Twi'LekEntertainer'', [[Evan Burger]] and [[Greg Mitchell]]) – April [[2006]]
